flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Tulane University of Louisiana rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($60.8k → $68.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Tulane University of Louisiana rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($60.8k → $68.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Tulane University of Louisiana fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Tulane University of Louisiana are 24% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($63.3k vs $51.0k).
